3009420.name: B.C. Piezophile Demo
3009420.description:
The Proving Grounds is a training course designed for the player to familiarize them sylfs with the normal handling procedures of the Strategic Force Multiplying Unit—or L.E.E.P.A.S—as overseen by the Mercy Envoy Atta’s Council of Esteemed Leapers. There is only one goal: Turn all the bulbs to the color of the monk’s medley.

In doing so, the player will be permitted to purchase the full game at full price. No other guidance will be given.

This demo gives full access to:

†1. a advanced suit of powered armor;

†2. one sixth millennium hyperweapon;

†3. and, for counsel, a medicated symbiote.

  • Miracle of Life. This is a handcrafted prelude for B.C. Piezophile which includes a large, open level with an obstacle course to help the player understand the suit's components at their own pace, emphasizing exploration and problem solving—essential tools for surviving the full game.

  • Budding Encyclopedia. The powerbrained supercomputer indulges in the vast collection of the See's archives in an attempt to understand life's mysteries.

  • God's Creatures. There are some crawling and flying thinges which like to play too.

  • Perfect Soundes.
